assertion_results.text: Version impact table shows NO (not affected) for all supported versions — every version ships a dependency version outside the CVE's affected range
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md table shows all 7 versions with 'NO' in the Affected? column: 2.1.0 (1.0.137), 2.1.1 (1.0.137), 2.2.0 (1.0.138), 2.2.1 (1.0.138), 2.2.2 (retag of 2.2.1), 2.2.3 (1.0.139), 2.2.4 (1.0.139). All versions ship serde_json >= 1.0.135 (the fix threshold). Summary states: 'No supported versions are affected.'

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing as Not a Bug with resolution, not creating remediation tasks (Step 8 Case C)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md: '## Decision: Case C -- Close as Not a Bug (not affected)'. Step 4: 'Transition to Closed with resolution "Not a Bug"'. '### No Remediation Tasks Created -- Since no supported versions are affected, no remediation tasks are needed.'

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting the version impact evidence — listing each version and its dependency version as proof of non-impact
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md section '2. Post triage summary comment' contains a table with all 7 versions, their streams, serde_json versions, and Affected? status (all NO). Text states: 'No supported versions ship a vulnerable version of serde_json. All supported versions ship serde_json 1.0.137+ which is outside the affected range (< 1.0.135).'

assertion_results.text: VEX Justification is set to 'Component not Present' or appropriate value when the VEX field is configured (Step 8 VEX Justification)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md: '### VEX Justification -- **Component not Present** -- the vulnerable version of serde_json (< 1.0.135) is not present in any supported product version.' Also includes Jira mutation: 'jira.edit_issue("TC-8002", fields={"customfield_12345": "Component not Present"})'

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT create any remediation tasks — no upstream backport, no downstream propagation (Step 8 Case C closes the issue)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md: '### No Remediation Tasks Created -- Since no supported versions are affected, no remediation tasks are needed.' No remediation.md file exists in the outputs directory (only data-extraction.md, version-impact.md, and triage-outcome.md).
